name: my-workflow
bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn2:definitions xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:bpmn2="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" id="Definitions_1" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn">
  <bpmn2:process id="Process_1" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn2:serviceTask id="Activity_0yg1ffm" name="addition agent">
      <bpmn2:outgoing>Flow_0j84isu</bpmn2:outgoing>
    </bpmn2:serviceTask>
    <bpmn2:intermediateCatchEvent id="Event_0cmk9zl" name="Timer">
      <bpmn2:incoming>Flow_0j84isu</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>Flow_014i49s</bpmn2:outgoing>
      <bpmn2:timerEventDefinition id="TimerEventDefinition_1vpu39a" />
    </bpmn2:intermediateCatchEvent>
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="Flow_0j84isu" sourceRef="Activity_0yg1ffm" targetRef="Event_0cmk9zl" />
    <bpmn2:serviceTask id="Activity_0fhxsbm" name="subtraction agent">
      <bpmn2:incoming>Flow_014i49s</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>Flow_1jzcmlb</bpmn2:outgoing>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>Flow_1tdujxv</bpmn2:outgoing>
    </bpmn2:serviceTask>
    <bpmn2:serviceTask id="Activity_0551btr" name="multiplication agent">
      <bpmn2:incoming>Flow_1jzcmlb</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>Flow_0knpb9n</bpmn2:outgoing>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>Flow_1gl50vc</bpmn2:outgoing>
    </bpmn2:serviceTask>
    <bpmn2:serviceTask id="Activity_0bfick4" name="division agent">
      <bpmn2:incoming>Flow_0knpb9n</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>Flow_0d5qwvf</bpmn2:outgoing>
    </bpmn2:serviceTask>
    <bpmn2:serviceTask id="Activity_1t1xizo" name="aggregate results agent">
      <bpmn2:incoming>Flow_1tdujxv</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:incoming>Flow_1gl50vc</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:incoming>Flow_0d5qwvf</bpmn2:incoming>
    </bpmn2:serviceTask>
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="Flow_014i49s" sourceRef="Event_0cmk9zl" targetRef="Activity_0fhxsbm" />
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1jzcmlb" sourceRef="Activity_0fhxsbm" targetRef="Activity_0551btr" />
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="Flow_0knpb9n" sourceRef="Activity_0551btr" targetRef="Activity_0bfick4" />
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1tdujxv" sourceRef="Activity_0fhxsbm" targetRef="Activity_1t1xizo" />
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1gl50vc" sourceRef="Activity_0551btr" targetRef="Activity_1t1xizo" />
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="Flow_0d5qwvf" sourceRef="Activity_0bfick4" targetRef="Activity_1t1xizo" />
  </bpmn2:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="Process_1">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_0yg1ffm_di" bpmnElement="Activity_0yg1ffm">
        <dc:Bounds x="50" y="110" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Event_0cmk9zl_di" bpmnElement="Event_0cmk9zl">
        <dc:Bounds x="72" y="262" width="36" height="36" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
          <dc:Bounds x="32.5" y="273" width="29" height="14" />
        </bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_0fhxsbm_di" bpmnElement="Activity_0fhxsbm">
        <dc:Bounds x="40" y="340" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_0551btr_di" bpmnElement="Activity_0551btr">
        <dc:Bounds x="200" y="340" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_0bfick4_di" bpmnElement="Activity_0bfick4">
        <dc:Bounds x="370" y="340" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_1t1xizo_di" bpmnElement="Activity_1t1xizo">
        <dc:Bounds x="190" y="500" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_0j84isu_di" bpmnElement="Flow_0j84isu">
        <di:waypoint x="100" y="190" />
        <di:waypoint x="100" y="226" />
        <di:waypoint x="90" y="226" />
        <di:waypoint x="90" y="262" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_014i49s_di" bpmnElement="Flow_014i49s">
        <di:waypoint x="90" y="298" />
        <di:waypoint x="90" y="340" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_1jzcmlb_di" bpmnElement="Flow_1jzcmlb">
        <di:waypoint x="140" y="380" />
        <di:waypoint x="200" y="380" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_0knpb9n_di" bpmnElement="Flow_0knpb9n">
        <di:waypoint x="300" y="380" />
        <di:waypoint x="370" y="380" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_1tdujxv_di" bpmnElement="Flow_1tdujxv">
        <di:waypoint x="140" y="380" />
        <di:waypoint x="165" y="380" />
        <di:waypoint x="165" y="510" />
        <di:waypoint x="190" y="510" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_1gl50vc_di" bpmnElement="Flow_1gl50vc">
        <di:waypoint x="250" y="420" />
        <di:waypoint x="250" y="460" />
        <di:waypoint x="240" y="460" />
        <di:waypoint x="240" y="500" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_0d5qwvf_di" bpmnElement="Flow_0d5qwvf">
        <di:waypoint x="370" y="380" />
        <di:waypoint x="330" y="380" />
        <di:waypoint x="330" y="520" />
        <di:waypoint x="290" y="520" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn2:definitions>

Activity_0yg1ffm.description: Adds two numbers together after a 5-second delay
Activity_0yg1ffm.label: addition agent

Activity_0fhxsbm.label: subtraction agent
Activity_0fhxsbm.description: Subtracts the second number from the first after a 5-second delay

Activity_0551btr.label: multiplication agent
Activity_0551btr.description: Multiplies two numbers together after a 5-second delay

Activity_0bfick4.label: division agent
Activity_0bfick4.description: Divides the first number by the second after a 5-second delay

Activity_1t1xizo.label: aggregate results agent
Activity_1t1xizo.description: Sums results from subtraction, multiplication, and division agents into a single total
